headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Corning Expands AI Data Center Portfolio: Will it Drive Growth?
summary: GLW licenses PRIZM TMT ferrule tech from US Conec, boosting high-density optical connectivity to support growing AI data center networks.

headline: Amphenol (APH) Surged More Than 50% in Q4 Due to Strong End Market
summary: Aoris Investment Management, a specialist international equity manager, released its “Aoris International Fund” Q4 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund focuses on investing in high-quality, wealth-creating businesses run by prudent and capable management and aims to deliver a return of 8–12% p.a. after fees over a 5–7-year […]

headline: A Look At Amphenol (APH) Valuation As AI Data Center Demand Fuels Earnings Upgrades And Fund Profit Taking
summary: Recent fund letters and analyst updates around Amphenol (APH) have highlighted a tension between strong AI driven IT/Datacom growth and questions about valuation, giving investors fresh context for assessing the stock. See our latest analysis for Amphenol. At a share price of US$134.54, Amphenol has seen some recent pressure, with a 30 day share price return of 6.7% decline and a year to date share price return of 3.7% decline. This stands in contrast to a very strong 1 year total shareholder...
